prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in `grafana/grafana` under `pkg/components/loki/` that define or configure: 1. HTTP client timeout and retry/backoff logic — files containing `StopNow`, `Timeout`, and `backoff` configuration for the HTTP Loki client. 2. gRPC client retry configuration — files containing `grpcretry.WithMax`, `Timeout` for the gRPC Loki client.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
